summary_en: The 20-foot pupusa, stuffed with mozzarella, chicharron and loroco, was nearly six feet larger than the previous world record.
summary: The 20-foot pupusa, stuffed with mozzarella, chicharron and loroco, was nearly six feet larger than the previous world record.
summary_es: Una pupusa de 20 pies de diámetro, rellena de mozzarella, chicharrón y loroco, superó por casi seis pies el récord mundial anterior, marcando un logro histórico para la comunidad salvadoreña en Washington, D.C.
title_en: Salvadoran chefs in D.C. break world record for largest pupusa
title_es: Chefs salvadoreños en D.C. rompen récord mundial con la pupusa más grande
title: Salvadoran chefs in D.C. break world record for largest pupusa
